title: thelypteris thailandica
intro: Thelypteris thailandica, also known as Thai Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris thailandica include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
